chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-707 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 28.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General a/w Imran Badar Accountant, District Accounts Officer Sukkur and SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP Khairpur ************** Counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and the purpose of filing present Constitution Petition stands served. Accordingly, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. In view of the above, the present Constitution Petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
